title: pittosporum turneri
intro: Pittosporum turneri, a plant native to New Zealand, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pittosporaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pittosporum turneri include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for various forms of use in traditional medicine.
